global_description: A medium-sized bird with a distinctive elongated body and a prominent crest. It features a striking black and white plumage with a vibrant red crest. The bird has a long, chisel-like bill and a strong, sturdy tail used for support against tree trunks.

part_details.crest: Bright red, triangular, and prominent on top of the head.
part_details.plumage: Predominantly black with white stripes on the face and neck.
part_details.bill: Long, straight, and chisel-like, ideal for pecking wood.
part_details.tail: Strong and stiff, black, used for bracing against trees.
part_details.wings: Broad and black with white underwing patches.

spatial_relations: The red crest is positioned on top of the head.
The long bill extends forward from the face.
The strong tail is positioned at the rear, used for support.
